title: lastrea filix-mas var. abbreviata
intro: Lastrea filix-mas var. abbreviata, also known as the dwarf lady fern, is a variety of the lady fern plant, characterized by its compact growth habit and shorter fronds compared to the typical lady fern. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea filix-mas var. abbreviata include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the dried fronds, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
